body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"ambiguous_scope: The bead is not safely refinable as written. Repo evidence conflicts with the prompt: `cli/go.mod` is already on `github.com/easel/fizeau v0.12.1`, so the description’s `v0.12.0` handoff claim is stale. The scope also spans several distinct call sites and seams (`cli/cmd/run.go:55`, `cli/internal/agent/dispatch.go:79-109`, `cli/internal/agent/service_run.go:119-128`, `cli/internal/agent/preclaim_intake_hook.go:167-173`) without file:line anchors in the bead itself, and no named test functions to preserve. Rewriting this would require choosing whether the intended fix is to remove all `ModelRef` plumbing, only CLI flags, or only specific Fizeau request fields, which is a scope/acceptance decision that needs operator clarification.","fingerprint":"4a4c61c4c495026c402b5fc3d74cf2535cc4223730d9e55d287891592f499c0c","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}

{"rationale":"Only the title clearly meets the rubric. The description does not give a file:line root-cause anchor, the acceptance criteria do not name any specific Test* symbols or include the required go test/lefthook gates, the labels are missing a phase facet, and parent/deps are absent, so the bead is not execution-ready.","score":1,"suggested_fixes":["Add a ROOT CAUSE section with concrete cli file:line evidence for the current ModelRef/--model-ref call sites and the go.mod pin.","Rewrite acceptance to name specific Test* symbols or a unique go test -run filter, and include both a scoped `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` command and `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Add a phase label and any needed cross-reference labels.","Set an explicit parent and list deps or state `No deps.` in the bead body.","Add a wired assertion that the updated Fizeau request fields are actually used in the call path."],"waivers_applied":[]}
